title: Breakfast Time (The Adventures Of Seumas Beg)
content:
The sun is always in the sky
            Whenever I get out of bed,
        And I often wonder why
            It's never late., My sister said
        She did not know who did the trick,
            And that she did not care a bit,
        And I should eat my porridge quick.
            ... I think it's mother wakens it.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James Stephens delivers a powerful performance in "Breakfast Time (The Adventures Of Seumas Beg)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
